title: zOOpy's Creepers
description: The 1000th retake on the Creeper texture
body:
Changes the Creeper texture to a texture I made to replace the old Alpha era texture, I think it's good but I wouldn't say it's supposed to be a "better" texture, however, it's a texture meant to be something I'd like more than the Vanilla texture. [Creeper Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d97d18344d6e6a456943945c08be63b82697c959_0.webp)
![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a9014e8bfbf1501e93c0317f1bfec68d8de53f6.png)
(This Pack has support for [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (It blinks!)
